```{=html}
<footer class="landing-footer">
  <p>By SciLifeLab Training Hub. Licensed under CC BY 4.0.</p>
  <p>Built with Quarto and hosted on GitHub Pages.</p>
  <a
    href="https://github.com/SciLifeLab-Training/scilifelab-training-template-staging"
    aria-label="GitHub repository"
  >
    <i class="bi bi-github"></i>
  </a>
</footer>
```
